/* ============================= SUPABASE ============================= */
const SUPABASE_URL = "https://jjdpuvfwertatngpyqzc.supabase.co";
const SUPABASE_KEY = "sb_publishable_EpSXvMr05otTf2EfRHqIsw_rbg-a9Sy";
const SUPABASE_HEADERS = {
  apikey: SUPABASE_KEY,
  Authorization: `Bearer ${SUPABASE_KEY}`,
  "Content-Type": "application/json",
};

let currentAccessToken = null;
function setCurrentAccessToken(token) { currentAccessToken = token; }
function getAuthHeaders() {
  return {
    apikey: SUPABASE_KEY,
    Authorization: `Bearer ${currentAccessToken || SUPABASE_KEY}`,
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
  };
}

async function supaSelect(table, query = "") {
  const res = await fetch(`${SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/${table}?${query}`, { headers: getAuthHeaders() });
  if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Erreur lecture ${table} (${res.status})`);
  return res.json();
}
async function supaInsert(table, payload) {
  const res = await fetch(`${SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/${table}`, {
    method: "POST",
    headers: { ...getAuthHeaders(), Prefer: "return=representation" },
    body: JSON.stringify(payload),
  });
  if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Erreur création ${table} (${res.status})`);
  return res.json();
}
async function supaDelete(table, id) {
  const res = await fetch(`${SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/${table}?id=eq.${encodeURIComponent(id)}`, {
    method: "DELETE",
    headers: getAuthHeaders(),
  });
  if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Erreur suppression ${table} (${res.status})`);
  return true;
}

/* ============================= AUTHENTIFICATION ============================= */
const AUTH_STORAGE_KEY = "gda_session";

async function authSignIn(email, password) {
  const res = await fetch(`${SUPABASE_URL}/auth/v1/token?grant_type=password`, {
    method: "POST",
    headers: { apikey: SUPABASE_KEY, "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    body: JSON.stringify({ email, password }),
  });
  const data = await res.json();
  if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error_description || data.msg || "Identifiants incorrects");
  localStorage.setItem(AUTH_STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(data));
  setCurrentAccessToken(data.access_token);
  return data;
}

async function authSignOut() {
  localStorage.removeItem(AUTH_STORAGE_KEY);
  setCurrentAccessToken(null);
}

function authGetStoredSession() {
  try {
    const raw = localStorage.getItem(AUTH_STORAGE_KEY);
    return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : null;
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
}

async function authGetUser(accessToken) {
  const res = await fetch(`${SUPABASE_URL}/auth/v1/user`, {
    headers: { apikey: SUPABASE_KEY, Authorization: `Bearer ${accessToken}` },
  });
  if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Session invalide");
  return res.json();
}

async function fetchOrCreateProfile(user) {
  const rows = await fetch(`${SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/profils?id=eq.${user.id}&select=*`, {
    headers: getAuthHeaders(),
  }).then((r) => r.json());
  if (rows && rows.length > 0) return rows[0];
  const created = await supaInsert("profils", [{
    id: user.id, nom: user.email.split("@")[0], email: user.email,
    role: "Super Administrateur", statut: "Actif", derniere_connexion: new Date().toISOString(),
  }]);
  return created[0];
}

/* ============================= DONNEES DEMO ============================= */
const RACES = ["Néo-Zélandais", "Californien", "Fauve de Bourgogne", "Papillon", "Géant des Flandres"];
const CAGES = ["A1", "A2", "A3", "B1", "B2", "B3", "C1", "C2", "Maternité-1", "Maternité-2"];

function makeRabbits() {
  const statuses = ["Reproducteur", "Reproductrice", "Gestante", "Engraissement", "Sevrage", "Vendu"];
  const arr = [];
  for (let i = 1; i <= 32; i++) {
    const sexe = i % 3 === 0 ? "Mâle" : "Femelle";
    const statut = sexe === "Mâle"
      ? (i % 5 === 0 ? "Reproducteur" : "Engraissement")
      : (i % 4 === 0 ? "Gestante" : i % 7 === 0 ? "Vendu" : "Reproductrice");
    arr.push({
      id: `LP-${String(1000 + i)}`,
      sexe,
      race: RACES[i % RACES.length],
      pere: sexe === "Femelle" ? `LP-${String(1000 + ((i + 3) % 32) + 1)}` : "-",
      mere: `LP-${String(1000 + ((i + 7) % 32) + 1)}`,
      naissance: `2025-${String(((i % 12) + 1)).padStart(2, "0")}-${String((i % 27) + 1).padStart(2, "0")}`,
      poids: (1.4 + (i % 10) * 0.23).toFixed(2),
      cage: CAGES[i % CAGES.length],
      statut,
      vaccins: 2 + (i % 3),
      alerte: i % 9 === 0,
    });
  }
  return arr;
}
const RABBITS = makeRabbits();

/* ============================= ATOMES UI ============================= */
function Card({ children, style, className = "" }) {
  return (
    <div
      className={`rounded-2xl ${className}`}
      style={{ background: C.paper, border: `1px solid ${C.line}`, boxShadow: "0 1px 2px rgba(15,61,31,0.04)", ...style }}
    >
      {children}
    </div>
  );
}

function Badge({ children, tone = "green" }) {
  const tones = {
    green: { bg: "#e9f3e6", fg: C.green700 },
    blue: { bg: "#e7f0f7", fg: C.blue600 },
    gold: { bg: "#f4efdf", fg: C.gold600 },
    red: { bg: "#fbe9e7", fg: "#b3402f" },
    grey: { bg: "#eef0ea", fg: C.inkSoft },
  };
  const t = tones[tone] || tones.grey;
  return (
    <span
      className="inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium"
      style={{ background: t.bg, color: t.fg, fontFamily: "Inter" }}
    >
      {children}
    </span>
  );
}

function statutTone(statut) {
  const map = {
    "Reproducteur": "blue", "Reproductrice": "green", "Gestante": "gold",
    "Engraissement": "grey", "Sevrage": "grey", "Vendu": "grey",
    "Payée": "green", "En attente": "gold", "Planifié": "blue", "En cours": "gold",
    "Terminé": "green", "Quarantaine": "red", "Actif": "green", "Bloqué": "red",
    "Congé": "gold", "Allaitement": "gold", "Sevré": "green", "Gestation": "blue",
  };
  return map[statut] || "grey";
}

function SectionHeader({ title, subtitle, action }) {
  return (
    <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-5 flex-wrap gap-3">
      <div>
        <h1 className="text-xl md:text-2xl font-semibold" style={{ fontFamily: "Poppins", color: C.ink }}>{title}</h1>
        {subtitle && <p className="text-sm mt-1" style={{ color: C.inkSoft, fontFamily: "Inter" }}>{subtitle}</p>}
      </div>
      {action}
    </div>
  );
}

function Btn({ children, onClick, variant = "primary", icon: Icon, size = "md" }) {
  const base = "inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl font-medium transition active:scale-[0.98]";
  const sizes = size === "sm" ? "px-3 py-1.5 text-xs" : "px-4 py-2.5 text-sm";
  const styles = {
    primary: { background: C.green700, color: "#fff" },
    secondary: { background: C.cream, color: C.green700, border: `1px solid ${C.line}` },
    ghost: { background: "transparent", color: C.inkSoft },
    danger: { background: "#fbe9e7", color: "#b3402f" },
  };
  return (
    <button onClick={onClick} className={`${base} ${sizes}`} style={{ fontFamily: "Inter", ...styles[variant] }}>
      {Icon && <Icon size={16} />}
      {children}
    </button>
  );
}

function Th({ children }) {
  return <th className="text-left px-4 py-3 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide" style={{ color: C.inkSoft, fontFamily: "Inter" }}>{children}</th>;
}
function Td({ children, className = "" }) {
  return <td className={`px-4 py-3 text-sm ${className}`} style={{ color: C.ink, fontFamily: "Inter" }}>{children}</td>;
}

function DataTable({ columns, rows, onRowClick, renderCell }) {
  return (
    <div className="overflow-x-auto">
      <table className="w-full border-collapse">
        <thead>
          <tr style={{ borderBottom: `1px solid ${C.line}` }}>
            {columns.map((c) => <Th key={c.key}>{c.label}</Th>)}
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          {rows.map((row, i) => (
            <tr
              key={i}
              onClick={() => onRowClick && onRowClick(row)}
              className={onRowClick ? "cursor-pointer" : ""}
              style={{ borderBottom: `1px solid ${C.line}`, background: i % 2 === 1 ? "#fbfbf8" : "transparent" }}
              onMouseEnter={(e) => (e.currentTarget.style.background = "#f1f5ec")}
              onMouseLeave={(e) => (e.currentTarget.style.background = i % 2 === 1 ? "#fbfbf8" : "transparent")}
            >
              {columns.map((c) => (
                <Td key={c.key}>{renderCell ? renderCell(c.key, row) : row[c.key]}</Td>
              ))}
            </tr>
          ))}
        </tbody>
      </table>
      {rows.length === 0 && (
        <div className="text-center py-10 text-sm" style={{ color: C.inkSoft, fontFamily: "Inter" }}>
          Aucune donnée pour le moment. Utilisez « Ajouter » pour créer le premier enregistrement.
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

function Modal({ open, onClose, title, children, wide }) {
  if (!open) return null;
  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-start md:items-center justify-center p-4" style={{ background: "rgba(15,25,15,0.45)" }}>
      <div className={`w-full ${wide ? "max-w-3xl" : "max-w-lg"} rounded-2xl overflow-hidden max-h-[88vh] flex flex-col`} style={{ background: C.paper }}>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-4" style={{ borderBottom: `1px solid ${C.line}` }}>
          <h3 className="font-semibold text-lg" style={{ fontFamily: "Poppins", color: C.ink }}>{title}</h3>
          <button onClick={onClose} className="p-1 rounded-lg hover:bg-black/5"><X size={20} color={C.inkSoft} /></button>
        </div>
        <div className="px-6 py-5 overflow-y-auto">{children}</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function Field({ label, children }) {
  return (
    <div className="mb-4">
      <label className="block text-xs font-medium mb-1.5" style={{ color: C.inkSoft, fontFamily: "Inter" }}>{label}</label>
      {children}
    </div>
  );
}
const inputStyle = { border: `1px solid ${C.line}`, fontFamily: "Inter" };
function TextInput(props) {
  return <input {...props} className="w-full px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm outline-none" style={inputStyle} />;
}
function Select({ options, ...props }) {
  return (
    <select {...props} className="w-full px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm outline-none bg-white" style={inputStyle}>
      {options.map((o) => <option key={o}>{o}</option>)}
    </select>
  );
}

function StatCard({ label, value, delta, positive, icon: Icon, accent }) {
  return (
    <Card className="p-5">
      <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
        <div>
          <p className="text-xs font-medium" style={{ color: C.inkSoft, fontFamily: "Inter" }}>{label}</p>
          <p className="text-2xl font-bold mt-1.5" style={{ fontFamily: "Poppins", color: C.ink }}>{value}</p>
        </div>
        <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center shrink-0" style={{ background: accent + "1A" }}>
          <Icon size={20} color={accent} />
        </div>
      </div>
      {delta && (
        <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mt-3 text-xs font-medium" style={{ color: positive ? C.green600 : "#b3402f" }}>
          {positive ? <ArrowUpRight size={14} /> : <ArrowDownRight size={14} />}
          {delta}
        </div>
      )}
    </Card>
  );
}

/* ============================= MODULE : DASHBOARD ============================= */
function Dashboard({ openRabbit }) {
  const alerts = [
    { icon: AlertTriangle, text: "Vaccin Myxomatose sous le seuil (18 doses)", tone: "red" },
    { icon: CalendarClock, text: "Mise bas prévue demain pour LP-1016 (P-102)", tone: "gold" },
    { icon: AlertTriangle, text: "Granulés reproduction sous le seuil (95 kg)", tone: "red" },
    { icon: Stethoscope, text: "LP-1019 en quarantaine — suivi requis", tone: "gold" },
  ];
  const tasks = [
    { text: "Contrôle quotidien maternité P-101 et P-102", done: true },
    { text: "Vacciner LP-1004 (Myxomatose)", done: false },
    { text: "Réceptionner commande AgroFeed CI", done: false },
    { text: "Relancer facture Boucherie Fine", done: false },
  ];
  return (
    <div>
      <SectionHeader title="Tableau de bord" subtitle="Vue d'ensemble de la ferme — mise à jour en temps réel" />
      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-6">
        <StatCard label="Chiffre d'affaires (mois)" value="5,3 M FCFA" delta="+8,1% vs mois dernier" positive icon={TrendingUp} accent={C.green600} />
        <StatCard label="Total lapins" value="1 248" delta="+34 ce mois" positive icon={PawPrint} accent={C.blue500} />
        <StatCard label="Femelles gestantes" value="16" icon={Heart} accent={C.gold600} />
        <StatCard label="Naissances du jour" value="9" icon={Baby} accent={C.green600} />
        <StatCard label="Mortalité (7 jours)" value="1,2%" delta="-0,3 pt" positive icon={Stethoscope} accent="#b3402f" />
        <StatCard label="Ventes du jour" value="392 000 FCFA" icon={ShoppingCart} accent={C.blue500} />
        <StatCard label="Dépenses (mois)" value="2,9 M FCFA" icon={Landmark} accent={C.gold600} />
        <StatCard label="Stock aliments" value="515 kg" delta="Seuil bas sur 2 réf." positive={false} icon={Warehouse} accent={C.green600} />
      </div>

      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-5 mb-6">
        <Card className="p-5 lg:col-span-2">
          <p className="font-semibold mb-4" style={{ fontFamily: "Poppins", color: C.ink }}>Chiffre d'affaires vs dépenses (M FCFA)</p>
          <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={220}>
            <AreaChart data={CA_MENSUEL}>
              <defs>
                <linearGradient id="ca" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
                  <stop offset="5%" stopColor={C.green500} stopOpacity={0.35} />
                  <stop offset="95%" stopColor={C.green500} stopOpacity={0} />
                </linearGradient>
              </defs>
              <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke={C.line} vertical={false} />
              <XAxis dataKey="mois" tick={{ fontSize: 12, fontFamily: "Inter" }} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} />
              <YAxis tick={{ fontSize: 12, fontFamily: "Inter" }} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} />
              <Tooltip />
              <Area type="monotone" dataKey="ca" stroke={C.green600} fill="url(#ca)" strokeWidth={2.5} name="Chiffre d'affaires" />
              <Line type="monotone" dataKey="depenses" stroke={C.gold500} strokeWidth={2} dot={false} name="Dépenses" />
            </AreaChart>
          </ResponsiveContainer>
        </Card>
        <Card className="p-5">
          <p className="font-semibold mb-4" style={{ fontFamily: "Poppins", color: C.ink }}>Répartition du cheptel</p>
          <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={220}>
            <PieChart>
              <Pie data={CHEPTEL_REPARTITION} dataKey="value" nameKey="name" innerRadius={45} outerRadius={75} paddingAngle={3}>
                {CHEPTEL_REPARTITION.map((e, i) => <Cell key={i} fill={e.color} />)}
              </Pie>
              <Tooltip />
            </PieChart>
          </ResponsiveContainer>
          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-2 justify-center">
            {CHEPTEL_REPARTITION.map((e) => (
              <span key={e.name} className="text-xs flex items-center gap-1.5" style={{ fontFamily: "Inter", color: C.inkSoft }}>
                <span className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full" style={{ background: e.color }} /> {e.name}
              </span>
            ))}
          </div>
        </Card>
      </div>

      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-5">
        <Card className="p-5 lg:col-span-1">
          <p className="font-semibold mb-4" style={{ fontFamily: "Poppins", color: C.ink }}>Naissances vs mortalité</p>
          <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={200}>
            <BarChart data={NAISSANCES_MORTALITE}>
              <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke={C.line} vertical={false} />
              <XAxis dataKey="mois" tick={{ fontSize: 11, fontFamily: "Inter" }} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} />
              <YAxis tick={{ fontSize: 11, fontFamily: "Inter" }} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} />
              <Tooltip />
              <Bar dataKey="naissances" fill={C.green500} radius={[6, 6, 0, 0]} name="Naissances" />
              <Bar dataKey="mortalite" fill="#c97b6a" radius={[6, 6, 0, 0]} name="Mortalité" />
            </BarChart>
          </ResponsiveContainer>
        </Card>

        <Card className="p-5">
          <p className="font-semibold mb-4" style={{ fontFamily: "Poppins", color: C.ink }}>Alertes</p>
          <div className="space-y-3">
            {alerts.map((a, i) => (
              <div key={i} className="flex items-start gap-2.5">
                <a.icon size={16} color={a.tone === "red" ? "#b3402f" : C.gold600} className="mt-0.5 shrink-0" />
                <p className="text-sm" style={{ fontFamily: "Inter", color: C.ink }}>{a.text}</p>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </Card>

        <Card className="p-5">
          <p className="font-semibold mb-4" style={{ fontFamily: "Poppins", color: C.ink }}>Tâches du jour</p>
          <div className="space-y-3">
            {tasks.map((t, i) => (
              <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-2.5">
                {t.done ? <CheckCircle2 size={17} color={C.green600} /> : <Circle size={17} color={C.inkSoft} />}
                <p className="text-sm" style={{ fontFamily: "Inter", color: t.done ? C.inkSoft : C.ink, textDecoration: t.done ? "line-through" : "none" }}>{t.text}</p>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </Card>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

/* ============================= MODULE : TABLEAU DE BORD PDG ============================= */
function PdgDashboard() {
  const totalLapins = RABBITS.length * 39; // extrapolation cheptel total (démo)
  const gestantes = RABBITS.filter((r) => r.statut === "Gestante").length * 4;
  const alertesSanitaires = HEALTH.filter((h) => ["Quarantaine", "En cours"].includes(h.statut)).length;
  const alertesStock = STOCK.filter((s) => s.qte < s.seuil).length;
  const presents = EMPLOYEES.filter((e) => e.present).length;
  const derniereCA = CA_MENSUEL[CA_MENSUEL.length - 1];
  const benefice = ((derniereCA.ca - derniereCA.depenses) * 1_000_000).toLocaleString("fr-FR");

  const kpis = [
    { label: "Total lapins", value: totalLapins.toLocaleString("fr-FR"), icon: PawPrint, accent: C.blue500 },
    { label: "Lapines gestantes", value: gestantes, icon: Heart, accent: C.gold600 },
    { label: "Naissances du jour", value: 9, icon: Baby, accent: C.green600 },
    { label: "Mortalités (jour)", value: 2, icon: Stethoscope, accent: "#b3402f" },
    { label: "Ventes du jour", value: "392 000 FCFA", icon: ShoppingCart, accent: C.blue500 },
    { label: "Bénéfice net (mois)", value: `${benefice} FCFA`, icon: TrendingUp, accent: C.green600 },
    { label: "Dépenses (mois)", value: `${(derniereCA.depenses * 1_000_000).toLocaleString("fr-FR")} FCFA`, icon: Landmark, accent: C.gold600 },
    { label: "Stock aliments", value: "515 kg", icon: Warehouse, accent: C.green600 },
    { label: "Alertes sanitaires", value: alertesSanitaires, icon: AlertTriangle, accent: "#b3402f" },
    { label: "Employés présents", value: `${presents}/${EMPLOYEES.length}`, icon: UserCheck, accent: C.blue500 },
  ];

  return (
    <div>
      <SectionHeader
        title="Tableau de bord PDG"
        subtitle="Vue consolidée de toute la ferme, en temps réel — accès Direction Générale"
        action={
          <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium" style={{ background: "#f4efdf", color: C.gold600, fontFamily: "Inter" }}>
            <Crown size={14} /> Vue Direction Générale
          </span>
        }
      />

      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-5 gap-4 mb-6">
        {kpis.map((k) => (
          <StatCard key={k.label} label={k.label} value={k.value} icon={k.icon} accent={k.accent} />
        ))}
      </div>

      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-5 mb-6">
        <Card className="p-5 lg:col-span-2">
          <p className="font-semibold mb-4" style={{ fontFamily: "Poppins", color: C.ink }}>Performances par bâtiment</p>
          <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={220}>
            <BarChart data={BUILDINGS}>
              <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke={C.line} vertical={false} />
              <XAxis dataKey="nom" tick={{ fontSize: 10, fontFamily: "Inter" }} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} interval={0}
                tickFormatter={(v) => v.split("—")[0].trim()} />
              <YAxis tick={{ fontSize: 11, fontFamily: "Inter" }} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} />
              <Tooltip />
              <Bar dataKey="lapins" fill={C.green500} radius={[6, 6, 0, 0]} name="Lapins" />
            </BarChart>
          </ResponsiveContainer>
        </Card>

        <Card className="p-5">
          <p className="font-semibold mb-4" style={{ fontFamily: "Poppins", color: C.ink }}>Alertes actives</p>
          <div className="space-y-3">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-sm" style={{ fontFamily: "Inter" }}>
              <span className="flex items-center gap-2"><Stethoscope size={15} color="#b3402f" /> Suivi sanitaire requis</span>
              <Badge tone="red">{alertesSanitaires}</Badge>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-sm" style={{ fontFamily: "Inter" }}>
              <span className="flex items-center gap-2"><Warehouse size={15} color="#b3402f" /> Articles sous le seuil</span>
              <Badge tone="red">{alertesStock}</Badge>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-sm" style={{ fontFamily: "Inter" }}>
              <span className="flex items-center gap-2"><Users size={15} color={C.gold600} /> Factures en attente</span>
              <Badge tone="gold">{SALES.filter((s) => s.statut === "En attente").length}</Badge>
            </div>
          </div>
        </Card>
      </div>

      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-5">
        <Card>
          <div className="px-5 pt-5 flex items-center gap-2">
            <Building2 size={17} color={C.green700} />
            <p className="font-semibold" style={{ fontFamily: "Poppins", color: C.ink }}>Détail par bâtiment</p>
          </div>
          <DataTable
            columns={[
              { key: "nom", label: "Bâtiment" }, { key: "responsable", label: "Responsable" },
              { key: "lapins", label: "Lapins" }, { key: "mortalite", label: "Mortalité" },
              { key: "occupation", label: "Occupation" }, { key: "ventesMois", label: "Ventes (mois)" },
            ]}
            rows={BUILDINGS}
            renderCell={(k, r) => {
              if (k === "mortalite") return `${r.mortalite}%`;
              if (k === "occupation") return `${r.occupation}%`;
              if (k === "ventesMois") return `${r.ventesMois.toLocaleString("fr-FR")} FCFA`;
              return r[k];
            }}
          />
        </Card>

        <Card className="p-5">
          <p className="font-semibold mb-4" style={{ fontFamily: "Poppins", color: C.ink }}>Présence des employés aujourd'hui</p>
          <div className="space-y-3">
            {EMPLOYEES.map((e) => (
              <div key={e.nom} className="flex items-center justify-between text-sm" style={{ fontFamily: "Inter" }}>
                <span className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  {e.present ? <CheckCircle2 size={15} color={C.green600} /> : <Circle size={15} color={C.inkSoft} />}
                  {e.nom} <span style={{ color: C.inkSoft }}>· {e.poste}</span>
                </span>
                <Badge tone={e.present ? "green" : "grey"}>{e.present ? "Présent" : "Absent"}</Badge>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </Card>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

/* ============================= MODULE : LAPINS ============================= */
function Toasts({ toasts }) {
  if (!toasts.length) return null;
  return (
    <div className="fixed bottom-5 right-5 z-[60] space-y-2">
      {toasts.map((t) => (
        <div key={t.id} className="px-4 py-3 rounded-xl text-sm shadow-lg"
          style={{ background: t.tone === "error" ? "#fbe9e7" : "#e9f3e6", color: t.tone === "error" ? "#b3402f" : C.green700, fontFamily: "Inter" }}>
          {t.message}
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

function useToasts() {
  const [toasts, setToasts] = useState([]);
  const push = (message, tone = "success") => {
    const id = Date.now() + Math.random();
    setToasts((t) => [...t, { id, message, tone }]);
    setTimeout(() => setToasts((t) => t.filter((x) => x.id !== id)), 3500);
  };
  return { toasts, push };
}

const emptyLapinForm = { sexe: "Mâle", race: RACES[0], naissance: "", poids: "", cage: CAGES[0], statut: "Reproducteur" };

function Lapins() {
  const [rabbits, setRabbits] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [loadError, setLoadError] = useState(null);
  const [q, setQ] = useState("");
  const [statutFilter, setStatutFilter] = useState("Tous");
  const [selected, setSelected] = useState(null);
  const [showAdd, setShowAdd] = useState(false);
  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
  const [archiving, setArchiving] = useState(false);
  const [form, setForm] = useState(emptyLapinForm);
  const { toasts, push } = useToasts();

  const loadRabbits = () => {
    setLoading(true);
    setLoadError(null);
    supaSelect("lapins", "select=*&order=id.asc")
      .then((rows) => {
        setRabbits(rows.map((r) => ({ ...r, vaccins: r.vaccins_a_jour })));
      })
      .catch((err) => setLoadError(err.message))
      .finally(() => setLoading(false));
  };

  useEffect(() => { loadRabbits(); }, []);

  const filtered = useMemo(() => rabbits.filter((r) => {
    const matchQ = r.id.toLowerCase().includes(q.toLowerCase()) || r.race.toLowerCase().includes(q.toLowerCase());
    const matchS = statutFilter === "Tous" || r.statut === statutFilter;
    return matchQ && matchS;
  }), [rabbits, q, statutFilter]);

  const columns = [
    { key: "id", label: "Numéro" }, { key: "sexe", label: "Sexe" }, { key: "race", label: "Race" },
    { key: "naissance", label: "Naissance" }, { key: "poids", label: "Poids (kg)" }, { key: "cage", label: "Cage" }, { key: "statut", label: "Statut" },
  ];

  const nextId = () => {
    const max = rabbits.reduce((m, r) => {
      const n = parseInt(String(r.id).replace("LP-", ""), 10);
      return isNaN(n) ? m : Math.max(m, n);
    }, 1000);
    return `LP-${max + 1}`;
  };

  const handleSave = async () => {
    if (!form.naissance || !form.poids) {
      push("Merci de renseigner la date de naissance et le poids.", "error");
      return;
    }
    setSaving(true);
    try {
      const payload = [{
        id: nextId(), sexe: form.sexe, race: form.race, naissance: form.naissance,
        poids: Number(form.poids), cage: form.cage, statut: form.statut,
        vaccins_a_jour: 0, alerte: false,
      }];
      await supaInsert("lapins", payload);
      push("Lapin enregistré dans la base de données.");
      setShowAdd(false);
      setForm(emptyLapinForm);
      loadRabbits();
    } catch (err) {
      push(`Échec de l'enregistrement : ${err.message}`, "error");
    } finally {
      setSaving(false);
    }
  };

  const handleArchive = async () => {
    if (!selected) return;
    setArchiving(true);
    try {
      await supaDelete("lapins", selected.id);
      push(`${selected.id} archivé (supprimé de la base).`);
      setSelected(null);
      loadRabbits();
    } catch (err) {
      push(`Échec de l'archivage : ${err.message}`, "error");
    } finally {
      setArchiving(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div>
      <SectionHeader
        title="Gestion des lapins"
        subtitle={
          loading ? "Chargement depuis la base de données…" :
          loadError ? "Erreur de connexion à la base de données" :
          `${rabbits.length} lapins enregistrés (source : Supabase) · fiche complète, QR code, historique`
        }
        action={<Btn icon={Plus} onClick={() => setShowAdd(true)}>Ajouter un lapin</Btn>}
      />

      {loadError && (
        <Card className="p-4 mb-4" style={{ borderColor: "#f0c9c2" }}>
          <p className="text-sm flex items-center gap-2" style={{ color: "#b3402f", fontFamily: "Inter" }}>
            <AlertTriangle size={15} /> Impossible de charger les lapins ({loadError}).
          </p>
          <Btn variant="secondary" size="sm" onClick={loadRabbits} icon={RefreshCcw}>Réessayer</Btn>
        </Card>
      )}

      <Card className="p-4 mb-4">
        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-3 items-center">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-xl flex-1 min-w-[220px]" style={{ border: `1px solid ${C.line}` }}>
            <Search size={16} color={C.inkSoft} />
            <input value={q} onChange={(e) => setQ(e.target.value)} placeholder="Rechercher par numéro ou race..." className="outline-none text-sm w-full" style={{ fontFamily: "Inter" }} />
          </div>
          <Select value={statutFilter} onChange={(e) => setStatutFilter(e.target.value)} options={["Tous", "Reproducteur", "Reproductrice", "Gestante", "Engraissement", "Sevrage", "Vendu"]} />
        </div>
      </Card>

      <Card>
        {loading ? (
          <div className="text-center py-10 text-sm" style={{ color: C.inkSoft, fontFamily: "Inter" }}>Chargement…</div>
        ) : (
          <DataTable
            columns={columns}
            rows={filtered}
            onRowClick={setSelected}
            renderCell={(key, row) => {
              if (key === "statut") return <Badge tone={statutTone(row.statut)}>{row.statut}</Badge>;
              if (key === "id") return <span className="font-medium flex items-center gap-1.5">{row.id}{row.alerte && <AlertTriangle size={13} color="#b3402f" />}</span>;
              return row[key];
            }}
          />
        )}
      </Card>

      <Modal open={!!selected} onClose={() => setSelected(null)} title={selected ? `Fiche lapin ${selected.id}` : ""} wide>
        {selected && (
          <div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mb-6">
              <div className="w-16 h-16 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center" style={{ background: C.cream }}>
                <QrCode size={30} color={C.green700} />
              </div>
              <div>
                <p className="font-semibold text-lg" style={{ fontFamily: "Poppins" }}>{selected.id}</p>
                <p className="text-xs" style={{ color: C.inkSoft, fontFamily: "Inter" }}>Code QR généré · RFID à venir</p>
              </div>
              <div className="ml-auto"><Badge tone={statutTone(selected.statut)}>{selected.statut}</Badge></div>
            </div>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-6">
              {[
                ["Sexe", selected.sexe], ["Race", selected.race], ["Cage", selected.cage],
                ["Date de naissance", selected.naissance], ["Poids actuel", `${selected.poids} kg`],
                ["Mère", selected.mere || "—"], ["Père", selected.pere || "—"], ["Vaccins à jour", `${selected.vaccins ?? 0}/3`],
              ].map(([l, v]) => (
                <div key={l}>
                  <p className="text-xs" style={{ color: C.inkSoft, fontFamily: "Inter" }}>{l}</p>
                  <p className="text-sm font-medium mt-0.5" style={{ fontFamily: "Inter" }}>{v}</p>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
            <p className="font-semibold mb-2 text-sm" style={{ fontFamily: "Poppins" }}>Historique médical</p>
            <div className="space-y-2 mb-2">
              {HEALTH.filter((h) => h.lapin === selected.id).length === 0 && (
                <p className="text-sm" style={{ color: C.inkSoft, fontFamily: "Inter" }}>Aucun événement médical enregistré.</p>
              )}
              {HEALTH.filter((h) => h.lapin === selected.id).map((h) => (
                <div key={h.id} className="flex items-center justify-between text-sm py-2" style={{ borderBottom: `1px solid ${C.line}`, fontFamily: "Inter" }}>
                  <span>{h.type} — {h.produit}</span>
                  <span style={{ color: C.inkSoft }}>{h.date}</span>
                  <Badge tone={statutTone(h.statut)}>{h.statut}</Badge>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
            <div className="flex gap-2 mt-5">
              <Btn variant="secondary" icon={Pencil} size="sm">Modifier la fiche</Btn>
              <Btn variant="danger" icon={Trash2} size="sm" onClick={handleArchive}>{archiving ? "Archivage…" : "Archiver"}</Btn>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </Modal>

      <Modal open={showAdd} onClose={() => { setShowAdd(false); setForm(emptyLapinForm); }} title="Ajouter un nouveau lapin">
        <Field label="Numéro (généré automatiquement)"><TextInput disabled value={nextId()} /></Field>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
          <Field label="Sexe"><Select value={form.sexe} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, sexe: e.target.value }))} options={["Mâle", "Femelle"]} /></Field>
          <Field label="Race"><Select value={form.race} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, race: e.target.value }))} options={RACES} /></Field>
          <Field label="Date de naissance"><TextInput type="date" value={form.naissance} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, naissance: e.target.value }))} /></Field>
          <Field label="Poids (kg)"><TextInput type="number" step="0.01" placeholder="1.80" value={form.poids} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, poids: e.target.value }))} /></Field>
          <Field label="Cage"><Select value={form.cage} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, cage: e.target.value }))} options={CAGES} /></Field>
          <Field label="Statut"><Select value={form.statut} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, statut: e.target.value }))} options={["Reproducteur", "Reproductrice", "Engraissement", "Sevrage"]} /></Field>
        </div>
        <Btn onClick={handleSave} icon={Check}>{saving ? "Enregistrement…" : "Enregistrer le lapin"}</Btn>
      </Modal>

      <Toasts toasts={toasts} />
    </div>
  );
}

/* ============================= MODULE : STOCK ============================= */
function Stock() {
  const columns = [
    { key: "nom", label: "Article" }, { key: "cat", label: "Catégorie" }, { key: "qte", label: "Quantité" },
    { key: "unite", label: "Unité" }, { key: "seuil", label: "Seuil alerte" }, { key: "fournisseur", label: "Fournisseur" },
  ];
  return (
    <div>
      <SectionHeader title="Gestion des stocks" subtitle="Aliments, médicaments, matériel, cages, consommables" action={<Btn icon={Plus}>Ajouter un article</Btn>} />
      <Card>
        <DataTable
          columns={columns}
          rows={STOCK}
          renderCell={(k, r) => {
            if (k === "qte") {
              const low = r.qte < r.seuil;
              return <span className="flex items-center gap-1.5 font-medium" style={{ color: low ? "#b3402f" : C.ink }}>{r.qte} {low && <AlertTriangle size={13} />}</span>;
            }
            if (k === "cat") return <Badge tone="grey">{r.cat}</Badge>;
            return r[k];
          }}
        />
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
}

    { titre: "Croissance", desc: "Courbes de poids, indice de consommation, GMQ", icon: PawPrint },
    { titre: "Stock", desc: "Rotation, ruptures, valorisation, péremption", icon: Warehouse },
    { titre: "Alimentation", desc: "Coût par kg vif, consommation par lot", icon: Wheat },

  ];
  return (

            <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center mb-3" style={{ background: C.green700 + "1A" }}>
              <c.icon size={20} color={C.green700} />

          </Card>
        ))}
      </div>

  );
}

/* ============================= MODULE : IA ============================= */
function IA() {
  const [msgs, setMsgs] = useState([
    { from: "ia", text: "Bonjour ! Je peux prévoir les mises bas, détecter les anomalies, anticiper les ruptures de stock et suggérer les meilleurs reproducteurs. Que souhaitez-vous savoir ?" },
  ]);
  const [q, setQ] = useState("");
  const send = () => {
    if (!q.trim()) return;
    setMsgs((m) => [...m, { from: "user", text: q }, { from: "ia", text: "Analyse en cours sur les données de la ferme... (fonctionnalité connectée à votre modèle IA dans la version complète)." }]);
    setQ("");
  };
  const cards = [
    { titre: "Prévision des mises bas", desc: "2 mises bas attendues dans les 3 prochains jours (P-102, P-104).", icon: Baby },
    { titre: "Détection d'anomalies", desc: "Baisse de poids inhabituelle détectée sur 3 sujets en cage B2.", icon: AlertTriangle },
    { titre: "Ruptures de stock prévues", desc: "Granulés reproduction : rupture estimée dans 6 jours.", icon: Warehouse },
    { titre: "Meilleurs reproducteurs", desc: "LP-1004 et LP-1020 affichent les meilleures performances du trimestre.", icon: Sparkles },
  ];
  return (
    <div>
      <SectionHeader title="Intelligence Artificielle" subtitle="Prévisions, détections et assistance intelligente pour la ferme" />
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4 mb-5">
        {cards.map((c) => (
          <Card key={c.titre} className="p-5 flex gap-3">
            <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center shrink-0" style={{ background: C.gold600 + "1A" }}>
              <c.icon size={20} color={C.gold600} />
            </div>
            <div>
              <p className="font-semibold" style={{ fontFamily: "Poppins" }}>{c.titre}</p>
              <p className="text-sm mt-1" style={{ color: C.inkSoft, fontFamily: "Inter" }}>{c.desc}</p>
            </div>
          </Card>
        ))}
      </div>
      <Card className="p-5">
        <p className="font-semibold mb-3" style={{ fontFamily: "Poppins" }}>Poser une question à l'assistant IA</p>
        <div className="space-y-3 mb-4 max-h-64 overflow-y-auto pr-1">
          {msgs.map((m, i) => (
            <div key={i} className={`max-w-[80%] px-4 py-2.5 rounded-2xl text-sm ${m.from === "user" ? "ml-auto" : ""}`}
              style={{ background: m.from === "user" ? C.green700 : C.cream, color: m.from === "user" ? "#fff" : C.ink, fontFamily: "Inter" }}>
              {m.text}
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
        <div className="flex gap-2">
          <TextInput value={q} onChange={(e) => setQ(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === "Enter" && send()} placeholder="Ex : Quelles femelles vont mettre bas cette semaine ?" />
          <Btn onClick={send}>Envoyer</Btn>
        </div>
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
}

/* ============================= MODULE : ADMIN ============================= */
function Admin() {
  const [users, setUsers] = useState(USERS);
  const [showRoles, setShowRoles] = useState(false);
  const [showAdd, setShowAdd] = useState(false);

  const toggleBlock = (email) => {
    setUsers((us) => us.map((u) => u.email === email ? { ...u, statut: u.statut === "Actif" ? "Bloqué" : "Actif" } : u));
  };

  return (
    <div>
      <SectionHeader
        title="Utilisateurs & Rôles"
        subtitle="Vous êtes connecté en tant que Super Administrateur"
        action={<div className="flex gap-2"><Btn variant="secondary" icon={KeyRound} onClick={() => setShowRoles(true)}>Voir les rôles ({ROLES.length})</Btn><Btn icon={Plus} onClick={() => setShowAdd(true)}>Créer un utilisateur</Btn></div>}
      />
      <Card>
        <DataTable
          columns={[{ key: "nom", label: "Nom" }, { key: "email", label: "Email" }, { key: "role", label: "Rôle" }, { key: "statut", label: "Statut" }, { key: "derniere", label: "Dernière connexion" }, { key: "actions", label: "" }]}
          rows={users}
          renderCell={(k, r) => {
            if (k === "statut") return <Badge tone={statutTone(r.statut)}>{r.statut}</Badge>;
            if (k === "actions") return (
              <div className="flex gap-1.5">
                <button onClick={() => toggleBlock(r.email)} title={r.statut === "Actif" ? "Bloquer" : "Débloquer"} className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-black/5">
                  {r.statut === "Actif" ? <Lock size={15} color={C.inkSoft} /> : <Unlock size={15} color={C.inkSoft} />}
                </button>
                <button title="Réinitialiser le mot de passe" className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-black/5"><RefreshCcw size={15} color={C.inkSoft} /></button>
                <button title="Modifier" className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-black/5"><Pencil size={15} color={C.inkSoft} /></button>
              </div>
            );
            return r[k];
          }}
        />
      </Card>

      <Modal open={showRoles} onClose={() => setShowRoles(false)} title="Liste des rôles disponibles" wide>
        <p className="text-sm mb-4" style={{ color: C.inkSoft, fontFamily: "Inter" }}>Ces rôles peuvent être modifiés ou complétés à tout moment. Chaque rôle donne accès uniquement aux fonctionnalités autorisées par le Super Administrateur.</p>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-2">
          {ROLES.map((r) => (
            <div key={r} className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg" style={{ background: C.cream }}>
              <ShieldCheck size={14} color={C.green700} />
              <span className="text-sm" style={{ fontFamily: "Inter" }}>{r}</span>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </Modal>

      <Modal open={showAdd} onClose={() => setShowAdd(false)} title="Créer un utilisateur">
        <Field label="Nom complet"><TextInput placeholder="Ex : Awa Traoré" /></Field>
        <Field label="Email"><TextInput type="email" placeholder="prenom@grainedafrique.com" /></Field>
        <Field label="Rôle"><Select options={ROLES} /></Field>
        <Field label="Mot de passe temporaire"><TextInput type="password" placeholder="Généré automatiquement" /></Field>
        <Btn icon={Check} onClick={() => setShowAdd(false)}>Créer le compte</Btn>
      </Modal>
    </div>
  );
}

/* ============================= MODULE : AUDIT ============================= */
function Audit() {
  return (
    <div>
      <SectionHeader title="Journal d'audit" subtitle="Historique complet des actions effectuées sur l'ERP" />
      <Card>
        <DataTable columns={[{ key: "qui", label: "Utilisateur" }, { key: "action", label: "Action" }, { key: "quand", label: "Date" }]} rows={AUDIT} />
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
}

/* ============================= LOGO ============================= */
function Logo({ compact }) {
  return (
    <div className="flex items-center gap-2.5">
      <div className="w-9 h-9 rounded-xl overflow-hidden flex items-center justify-center shrink-0" style={{ background: "#fff" }}>
        <img src={LOGO_URL} alt="Graine d'Afrique" className="w-full h-full object-contain" />
      </div>
      {!compact && (
        <div className="leading-tight">
          <p className="font-bold text-sm" style={{ fontFamily: "Poppins", color: C.green700 }}>GRAINE <span style={{ color: C.gold600 }}>D'AFRIQUE</span></p>
          <p className="text-[10px] tracking-wide" style={{ color: C.inkSoft, fontFamily: "Inter" }}>ERP FERME CUNICOLE</p>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

/* ============================= APP ============================= */
/* ============================= LOGIN ============================= */
function Login({ onSuccess }) {
  const [email, setEmail] = useState("");
  const [password, setPassword] = useState("");
  const [error, setError] = useState("");
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

  const handleSubmit = async (e) => {
    e && e.preventDefault();
    setError("");
    if (!email || !password) {
      setError("Merci de renseigner votre email et votre mot de passe.");
      return;
    }
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const session = await authSignIn(email, password);
      const profile = await fetchOrCreateProfile(session.user);
      onSuccess(session, profile);
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err.message || "Connexion impossible.");
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center p-4" style={{ background: C.cream }}>
      <style>{FONTS}</style>
      <Card className="w-full max-w-sm p-8">
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center mb-6">
          <img src={LOGO_URL} alt="Graine d'Afrique" className="w-16 h-16 object-contain mb-3" />
          <p className="font-bold text-lg" style={{ fontFamily: "Poppins", color: C.green700 }}>
            GRAINE <span style={{ color: C.gold600 }}>D'AFRIQUE</span>
          </p>
          <p className="text-xs tracking-wide" style={{ color: C.inkSoft, fontFamily: "Inter" }}>ERP FERME CUNICOLE</p>
        </div>
        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit}>
          <Field label="Email">
            <TextInput type="email" value={email} onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)} placeholder="prenom@grainedafrique.com" autoComplete="username" />
          </Field>
          <Field label="Mot de passe">
            <TextInput type="password" value={password} onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)} placeholder="••••••••" autoComplete="current-password" />
          </Field>
          {error && (
            <p className="text-sm mb-4" style={{ color: "#b3402f", fontFamily: "Inter" }}>{error}</p>
          )}
          <button type="submit" disabled={loading} className="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl font-medium py-2.5 text-sm"
            style={{ background: C.green700, color: "#fff", fontFamily: "Inter", opacity: loading ? 0.7 : 1 }}>
            {loading ? "Connexion..." : "Se connecter"}
          </button>
        </form>
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
}

export default function App() {
  const [session, setSession] = useState(null);
  const [profile, setProfile] = useState(null);
  const [authLoading, setAuthLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    const stored = authGetStoredSession();
    if (!stored) { setAuthLoading(false); return; }
    setCurrentAccessToken(stored.access_token);
    authGetUser(stored.access_token)
      .then((user) => fetchOrCreateProfile(user).then((p) => { setSession(stored); setProfile(p); }))
      .catch(() => { authSignOut(); })
      .finally(() => setAuthLoading(false));
  }, []);

  const handleLogout = () => {
    authSignOut();
    setSession(null);
    setProfile(null);
  };

  const [active, setActive] = useState("dashboard");
  const [mobileOpen, setMobileOpen] = useState(false);
  const [openGroups, setOpenGroups] = useState(() => Object.fromEntries(NAV.map((g) => [g.group, true])));

  const activeLabel = NAV.flatMap((g) => g.items).find((i) => i.key === active)?.label || "";

  const pages = {
    dashboard: <Dashboard />, pdg: <PdgDashboard />, lapins: <Lapins />, reproduction: <Reproduction />, maternite: <Maternite />,
    sante: <Sante />, alimentation: <Alimentation />, stock: <Stock />, achats: <Achats />,
    commercial: <Commercial />, compta: <Compta />, rh: <RH />, maintenance: <Maintenance />,
    logistique: <Logistique />, mlm: <MLM />, rapports: <Rapports />, ia: <IA />, admin: <Admin />, audit: <Audit />,
  };

  const SidebarContent = (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col">
      <div className="px-5 py-5"><Logo /></div>
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-3 pb-4">
        {NAV.map((g) => (
          <div key={g.group} className="mb-1">
            <button
              onClick={() => setOpenGroups((s) => ({ ...s, [g.group]: !s[g.group] }))}
              className="w-full flex items-center justify-between px-3 py-2 text-[11px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide"
              style={{ color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.55)", fontFamily: "Inter" }}
            >
              {g.group}
              {openGroups[g.group] ? <ChevronDown size={13} /> : <ChevronRight size={13} />}
            </button>
            {openGroups[g.group] && (
              <div className="space-y-0.5 mb-2">
                {g.items.map((item) => {
                  const isActive = active === item.key;
                  return (
                    <button
                      key={item.key}
                      onClick={() => { setActive(item.key); setMobileOpen(false); }}
                      className="w-full flex items-center gap-2.5 px-3 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition"
                      style={{
                        background: isActive ? "rgba(255,255,255,0.14)" : "transparent",
                        color: isActive ? "#fff" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.75)",
                        fontFamily: "Inter",
                      }}
                    >
                      <item.icon size={16} />
                      {item.label}
                    </button>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
      <div className="px-4 py-4 mx-3 mb-3 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-between gap-2" style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.08)" }}>
        <div className="min-w-0">
          <p className="text-xs font-medium truncate" style={{ color: "#fff", fontFamily: "Inter" }}>{profile?.role || "Utilisateur"}</p>
          <p className="text-[11px] mt-0.5 truncate" style={{ color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.6)", fontFamily: "Inter" }}>{profile?.email || ""}</p>
        </div>
        <button onClick={handleLogout} title="Se déconnecter" className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-white/10 shrink-0">
          <LogOut size={15} color="rgba(255,255,255,0.75)" />
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );

  if (authLoading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center" style={{ background: C.cream }}>
        <p className="text-sm" style={{ color: C.inkSoft, fontFamily: "Inter" }}>Chargement...</p>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (!session) {
    return <Login onSuccess={(s, p) => { setSession(s); setProfile(p); }} />;
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ background: C.cream, minHeight: "100vh", fontFamily: "Inter" }}>
      <style>{FONTS}</style>

      {/* Sidebar desktop */}
      <aside className="hidden lg:block fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-64" style={{ background: `linear-gradient(190deg, ${C.green900}, ${C.green700})` }}>
        {SidebarContent}
      </aside>

      {/* Sidebar mobile */}
      {mobileOpen && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-40 lg:hidden">
          <div className="absolute inset-0" style={{ background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.4)" }} onClick={() => setMobileOpen(false)} />
          <aside className="absolute left-0 top-0 h-full w-64" style={{ background: `linear-gradient(190deg, ${C.green900}, ${C.green700})` }}>
            {SidebarContent}
          </aside>
        </div>
      )}

      <div className="lg:pl-64">
        {/* Topbar */}
        <header className="sticky top-0 z-30 flex items-center gap-3 px-4 md:px-7 py-3.5" style={{ background: C.paper, borderBottom: `1px solid ${C.line}` }}>
          <button className="lg:hidden p-1.5" onClick={() => setMobileOpen(true)}><Menu size={22} color={C.ink} /></button>
          <div className="lg:hidden"><Logo compact /></div>
          <p className="hidden lg:block font-semibold" style={{ fontFamily: "Poppins", color: C.ink }}>{activeLabel}</p>
          <div className="flex-1" />
          <div className="hidden md:flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-xl w-64" style={{ border: `1px solid ${C.line}` }}>
            <Search size={15} color={C.inkSoft} />
            <input placeholder="Rechercher..." className="outline-none text-sm w-full" style={{ fontFamily: "Inter" }} />
          </div>
          <button className="relative p-2 rounded-xl hover:bg-black/5">
            <Bell size={19} color={C.ink} />
            <span className="absolute top-1.5 right-1.5 w-2 h-2 rounded-full" style={{ background: "#b3402f" }} />
          </button>
          <div className="w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center font-semibold text-sm" style={{ background: C.green700, color: "#fff", fontFamily: "Poppins" }}>SA</div>
        </header>

        <main className="p-4 md:p-7">{pages[active]}</main>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
